div1.entryFree:
Shipping, 1) ships, vessels: he lent me some s. Ant. III, 6, 27. our overplus of s. III, 7, 51. his s., poor ignorant baubles, Cymb. III, 1, 26. what s. and what lading's in our haven, Per. I, 2, 49. to take s. == to take ship, to embark: H6A V, 5, 87.
2) navigation: God send 'em good s. Shr. V, 1, 43.
